channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: 007 First Light’s developer lays off staff but claims its next franchise will continue
item.description: IO Interactive, the studio behind the Hitman series and 007 First Light, announced that it is laying off staff after a relationship with an "external partner" on its next big franchise, Project...

item.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
item.description: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.

item.title: Institutional Memory in Distributed Financial Systems: When Knowledge Becomes Infrastructure
item.description: Abstract Distributed financial systems are described through code, architecture diagrams, databases, queues, ledgers, custody protocols, and compliance engines. These elements matter, but they do...

item.title: Build a Box Plot Calculator in Pure JavaScript — No Libraries Needed
item.description: Build a Box Plot Calculator in Pure JavaScript — No Libraries Needed A box plot (or box-and-whisker plot) is one of the most powerful tools in exploratory data analysis. In one compact graphic, it...

item.title: The 4th Down Revolution: Why NFL Teams Win 67% More Games When They Trust the Math [Jun 30]
item.description: Most NFL head coaches would rather punt on 4th-and-2 from the opponent's 40-yard line than face a talk-radio mob. They're also leaving approximately 8-12 wins per season on the table across the...

item.title: 3 MCP servers I actually use daily (and how to set them up)
item.description: Not a hype list. These are the three MCP servers I have running right now in Claude Desktop. 1. Filesystem mcp-hub install @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem I use this to let Claude read...

item.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
item.description: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5
item.description: Article URL: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-5 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48736605 Points: 57 # Comments: 7

item.title: Loop Engineering: Do Frontend and Fullstack Devs Actually Need It?
item.description: Introduction I keep hearing the term loop engineering. It's all over my feed, every AI newsletter, half the dev videos I open. So I had the same question you probably have. Is this actually...

item.title: Stop Chasing Languages. Learn to Think Like an Engineer.
item.description: Architects write pseudocode, which must then be translated into any programming language. If you’re waiting for the “best” language to start, you’re already behind. As a Software Engineer, You...

item.title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
item.description: Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. The startup's new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using...

item.title: The Physics of Microservices: What Thermodynamics Teaches Us About System Design
item.description: Thermodynamics is the study of energy, disorder, and the stubborn tendency of systems to fall apart. Sound familiar? I spent years studying physics before moving into software engineering. For a...

item.title: Deploy an AI Chatbot on Your NextJS Website using FREE tools
item.description: Building an AI agent is easy to demo. Shipping one to a real website, with your own knowledge and a working deployment, is the part that matters. In this tutorial, you’ll see how to build a free...

item.title: I Built a Closed-Loop Self-Healing System for My AI Config — By Accident
item.description: I didn't set out to build a self-healing system. I just wanted to stop forgetting things. What emerged was a feedback loop that fixes itself without me. After 40+ Claude Code sessions, I noticed a...

item.title: Moto’s Tag 2 tracker is $20 for a limited time
item.description: Announced at CES 2026, the Moto Tag 2 has finally arrived in the US. The Bluetooth tracker with improved battery life over its predecessor, plus UWB sensing for more accurate tracking, is...

item.title: Roundtables: Longevity’s Next Frontier: “Reprogramming” Your Body
item.description: Listen to the session or watch below Billions of dollars are flooding into efforts to reverse aging as scientists explore ways to return cells to a younger state. But how far off are these...

item.title: Netflix is using an AI-generated Gene Wilder voice in its Willy Wonka reality show
item.description: A new teaser trailer confirmed that Wonka's The Golden Ticket will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its Squid Game reality show in the trend of creating real competitions based on...

item.title: Rockstar workers push to unionize ahead of GTA VI’s launch
item.description: Workers at Grand Theft Auto VI developer Rockstar Games have submitted a request for their union, the IWGB Game Workers Union, to be voluntarily recognized, according to a press release. The...

item.title: Google’s killing off Tenor GIF searches in other apps
item.description: The GIF-picking interfaces in some of your favorite online platforms might look different going forward, as Google prepares to shut down the Tenor API today. While the Tenor website, along with...

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
item.description: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

item.title: Xbox weighs canceling Blade game and shuttering Arkane
item.description: Microsoft is set to announce a wave of layoffs for its Xbox studios and employees next week. Sources familiar with Microsoft's plans tell The Verge that the layoffs will lead to studio closures or...

item.title: The Bose Soundlink Max is $120 off ahead of the July 4th weekend
item.description: The Bose Soundlink Max is usually $399, but has been on steep discount this week at Amazon, Best Buy, and directly from Bose for $279. This Bluetooth speaker has a big and bold sound, with a wide...

item.title: What is a quantum computer good for? Absolutely nothing — yet
item.description: To this day, we have yet to see a quantum computer conclusively perform a single useful task. Existing machines are simply too small and error-ridden to solve commercially relevant problems. That...

item.title: Langflow RCE Exploited to Deploy Monero Miner on Exposed AI App Endpoints
item.description: Threat actors are continuing to exploit a critical Langflow vulnerability as part of fresh attacks designed to deliver a Monero cryptocurrency miner. The activity has been found to weaponize...

item.title: Silent Swap Crypto Clipper Uses Fake Google Notes Extension to Replace Wallet Addresses
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged an active browser extension campaign that is designed to steal cryptocurrency by stealthily replacing wallet addresses when unsuspecting users initiate a...

item.title: Libby will filter out AI content, kind of
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. "AI is the new frontier for...

item.title: X now offers an MCP server to make its platform easier for AI tools to use
item.description: X has launched a hosted MCP server, making it easier for developers to connect AI applications with the company’s API.

item.title: Podcasting platform Riverside enters the newsletter publishing game
item.description: Users will be able use AI to create newsletters based on their recordings.

item.title: Amazon launches new $1 billion FDE org, following OpenAI and Anthropic
item.description: Engineers on the new team will embed within companies to deploy purpose-built agents, focusing on fast deployments and customer self-sufficiency.

item.title: The Supreme Court stops Trump’s attempt to end birthright citizenship
item.description: The Supreme Court upheld birthright citizenship, ruling 6-3 against President Donald Trump's effort to end the longstanding constitutional right via executive order. Birthright citizenship dates...
